con:part.con:content: <!--Published by XML-WS Runtime (https://github.com/eclipse-ee4j/metro-jax-ws). Runtime's version is XML-WS Runtime 4.0.1 git-revision#298606e.--> <!--Generated by XML-WS Runtime (https://github.com/eclipse-ee4j/metro-jax-ws). Runtime's version is XML-WS Runtime 4.0.1 git-revision#298606e.--> <definitions targetNamespace="https://aerosimo.com/api/ws/mailbox/v1" name="postmaster" xmlns:wsu="http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-utility-1.0.xsd" xmlns:wsp="http://www.w3.org/ns/ws-policy" xmlns:wsp1_2="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/09/policy" xmlns:wsam="http://www.w3.org/2007/05/addressing/metadata" xmlns:soap12="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap12/" xmlns:tns="https://aerosimo.com/api/ws/mailbox/v1" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/"> <types> <xsd:schema> <xsd:import namespace="https://aerosimo.com/api/ws/mailbox/v1" schemaLocation="http://ominet.aerosimo.com:8082/mailbox/ws/mailbox/v1?xsd=1"/> </xsd:schema> </types> <message name="SendEmail"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:SendEmail"/> </message> <message name="SendEmailResponse"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:SendEmailResponse"/> </message> <portType name="mailbox"> <operation name="SendEmail"> <input wsam:Action="https://aerosimo.com/api/ws/mailbox/v1/mailbox/SendEmailRequest" message="tns:SendEmail"/> <output wsam:Action="https://aerosimo.com/api/ws/mailbox/v1/mailbox/SendEmailResponse" message="tns:SendEmailResponse"/> </operation> </portType> <binding name="sendmailBinding" type="tns:mailbox"> <soap12:binding transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http" style="document"/> <operation name="SendEmail"> <soap12:operation soapAction=""/> <input> <soap12:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap12:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> </binding> <service name="postmaster"> <port name="sendmail" binding="tns:sendmailBinding"> <soap12:address location="http://ominet.aerosimo.com:8082/mailbox/ws/mailbox/v1"/> </port> </service> </definitions>

<!--Published by XML-WS Runtime (https://github.com/eclipse-ee4j/metro-jax-ws). Runtime's version is XML-WS Runtime 4.0.1 git-revision#298606e.--> <xs:schema version="1.0" targetNamespace="https://aerosimo.com/api/ws/mailbox/v1" xmlns:tns="https://aerosimo.com/api/ws/mailbox/v1" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:element name="SendEmail" type="tns:SendEmail"/> <xs:element name="SendEmailResponse" type="tns:SendEmailResponse"/> <xs:complexType name="SendEmail"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="emailAddress" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="emailSubject" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="emailMessage" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="emailFrom" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="emailFiles" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="SendEmailResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="Status" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:schema>

con:call.name: Request 1
con:call.con:request: <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope" xmlns:v1="https://aerosimo.com/api/ws/mailbox/v1">\r <soap:Header/>\r <soap:Body>\r <v1:SendEmail>\r <emailAddress>ayomide@omisore.co.uk</emailAddress>\r <emailSubject>Test From SoapUI</emailSubject>\r <emailMessage>This is a test email running from soapUI via Jenkins</emailMessage>\r <emailFrom>support@aerosimo.com</emailFrom>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <emailFiles></emailFiles>\r </v1:SendEmail>\r </soap:Body>\r </soap:Envelope>
